addSpot.title: Create a New Spot
addSpot.nameExplanation: Choose a descriptive and attractive name.
addSpot.enaireExplanation: Check flight restrictions for this location on the official map.
addSpot.videoTooLongMessage: The video cannot be longer than {{maxDuration}} seconds.
addSpot.videoTooLargeMessage: The video cannot be larger than {{maxSize}} MB.
addSpot.videoExplanation: Upload videos up to {{maxDuration}} seconds and under {{maxSize}} MB. We'll auto-compress clips above {{compressionThreshold}} MB.
addSpot.tipsBody:
• Connect to a stable Wi‑Fi network before uploading videos.
• Take your time to describe the spot and add quality photos/videos.
• Double-check the location and flight permissions prior to publishing.
addSpot.galleryLimitReached: You can upload up to 5 photos.
addSpot.tagsHint: Add up to {{max}} tags to describe the spot (e.g., #urban #park).

spotVersions.title: Spot Versions
